# Anchor

Position anchor for markers and annotations. Follows MapLibre GL JS
PositionAnchor format.

## Type

```typescript
| "center"
  | "top"
  | "bottom"
  | "left"
  | "right"
  | "top-left"
  | "top-right"
  | "bottom-left"
  | "bottom-right"
```
